positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical, centered illustration of a whimsical cosmic landscape. The main subject is a majestic, bioluminescent space whale traversing a ringed gas giant planet, surrounded by floating crystal nebula formations and stylized celestial fauna (e.g., star jellyfish, asteroid rings). The style should be a blend of art deco geometry and ethereal vaporwave aesthetics, using bold, clean silhouettes and strong, deep-sea contrasting colors (sapphire blue, turquoise, magenta, and glowing gold accents). The composition must be perfectly balanced and optimized for a square print canvas. Dramatic rim lighting emanates from the nebula, giving the edges of the whale and crystal structures a brilliant glow. Ink illustration quality, high contrast, maximalist yet clean.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, messy, dirty, low resolution, poor composition, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, noise, gradient fade, cropped
